text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the autumn Tenno Sho, and Gold
Ship unveils her secret weapon in preparation for
this massive stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The weapon? A pile of prickly sea urchin-stuffed
chestnuts, spiky shells and all! With these, all of
Gold Ship's rivals will eat her dust! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I confiscate them all, of course, to ensure a fair
race against Tosen Jordan.
